name: Escape
_source: s;Krista;See ya, Lake Lunaris!|Hope to visit you properly soon!
s;Trevor;Foliaga's Holy Knights are no match for my stealth and cunning!
s;Aqua;Oh Great Folia, please watch over Lunaris and its people.
s;Semi;Folia, grant us and Lunaris peace.
s;Michael;Oh Folia please keep the people of Lunaris safe from harm and uh--|{c:e;Michael;NormalBlink}I'm sorry, Great Folia! I'll pray properly later!!
s;Marina;Great Folia, keep Lunaris safe as I leave on this journey.
if;u('Krista').position == None and (game.get_rescuer(u('Krista')) == None or (game.get_rescuer(u('Krista')) != None and game.get_rescuers_position(u('Krista')) == None))
for;LeftBehind;[unit.nid for unit in game.get_player_units_and_travelers() if 'Canon' not in unit.tags]
